div.h1: Project Atlas — HTTP Server Component Map
div.p: Satellite map: four milestone zones, data flow, concurrency fan-out

g.text: RED = hot path / danger / attack surface
MSG_NOSIGNAL | send() flag | per-call on Linux
0x828 | const char* | body // ptr into raw buf
Total: ~36 KB stack — consider heap alloc
OWS | trim both ends | spaces+tabs stripped
obs-fold| append to prev | CRLF+SP continuation
bare LF | memchr('\n') | CRLF and LF both accepted
Stage 4 | prefix check | canonical[root_len]=/ or NUL
Stage 5 | open(O_RDONLY) | binary, no newline xlation
stat() st_mtime | file mod time (UTC time_t)
timegm() | NOT mktime() — avoids TZ offset
st_mtime <= ims | equal = cached valid (1s granularity)
304 response | same headers, zero body bytes
accept EINTR | continue | re-check shutdown flag
broadcast cond | wakes all workers | shutdown=1
pthread_join x N| drain in-flight | then close(server_fd)
active_connections | pthread_mutex_t lock | incr on open
total_connections | same lock | incr on open
